entries.title: own_stack bootstrap — hexa-lang 자체 proposal-inventory 체계
entries.done_note: 구현: tool/proposal_inbox.hexa + bin/proposal_inbox + hooks/pre-commit-inbox-check + gate/commands.json preflight_all_repos. 5 repo inventory.json 부트스트랩. commits: 4d8e8f1e · 50fd8756 · 50c1c476

entries.title: string.rfind() 미구현 — gate/prompt_scan.hexa 에서 우회용 shell basename 사용. runtime/stdlib 에 추가 필요
entries.done_note: 소스 수정 완료 (self/runtime.c + self/codegen_c2.hexa 3 경로). Commit 확인. 바이너리 rebuild (codegen_c2_v2.c 재생성 + stage0 rebuild) 는 별도 세션. .find() case (ea3f9496) 와 동일 패턴.

entries.title: reserved keyword 비정 contextual: guard / generate / parse 가 사용자 식별자 금지 — parser 에 contextual keyword 메커니즘 도입 (anima upstream bug #2)
entries.done_note: source SSOT fixed in commit 30e20b1d (parser.hexa) + 95ebe161 (hexa_full.hexa bundle). Verified via out-of-tree stage0 rebuild (/tmp/hexa_stage0_new) — kw_repro + rng_ctx_test + pcc_roundtrip + mcts.hexa all pass. build/hexa_stage0.real replacement blocked by sandbox in this session; user should run tool/rebuild_stage0.hexa to activate.

entries.title: exec_capture / now / setenv hx_ prefix mangling 누락 (AOT 모드) — interpreter OK, hexa build 시 clang undeclared identifier. self/native/hexa_v2 transpiler 수정 (anima upstream bug #1, CRITICAL)
entries.done_note: runtime macro shim (commit 72cf21f4) — AOT repro now builds + runs; regen follow-up deferred

entries.title: exec() 에서 shell metachar (&&, ||, $, |) informational warning — 기능 OK 지만 로그 노이즈. opt-in env var (HEXA_EXEC_STRICT=1) 로 전환 고려
entries.done_note: self/hexa_full.hexa: HEXA_EXEC_WARN=1 opt-in gate (95ebe161). bin rebuild pending.

entries.title: write_file 이 truncate — append 는 exec('printf >> file') 우회. 공식 append_file(path, s) / open_file(path, 'a') primitive 추가 제안
entries.done_note: discoverability 문제였음. hexa_append_file 은 runtime.c:5857 에 이미 존재. hx_meta_telemetry.hexa 에서 exec printf >> 를 append_file() 로 전환 (commit). proposal_inbox 는 python3 heredoc 쓰므로 해당 없음.

entries.title: void repo 가 proposal_inbox 체계에 합류 (2026-04-23) — SSH terminal 전문. airgenome compute_filter 와 별개. sister_repos 5 개와 상호 advisory/proposal 교환 가능.
entries.done_note: advisory 인지 완료 — void 합류 이미 반영 (10-repo sister_repos 맵에 등록됨, 52bbe53f / e38c2611)

entries.title: SANDBOX-WRITE: n6-architecture repo blocks Write/bash of .sh/.py extensions (HEXA-FIRST enforcement). Workaround: extension-less files or .hexa with exec() shims. Clustered: 1 incident — tool/_n6_lib (2026-04-23). Forward any same-class lang_gap here rather than piling per-repo.
entries.done_note: Advisory cluster accepted. hexa-lang inbox is the canonical sink for HEXA-FIRST sandbox-write lang_gap reports. Workaround already validated in-tree (stdlib/*.hexa use exec() shim pattern for shell-level work; extension-less tool/ scripts exist). No code change — future same-class reports route here.

entries.title: ENGINE-STUB: 7/16 n6 engine/*.hexa tools emit STUB (hexa stage1 regression — no float/try-catch/enum/comptime). List: anima_tension_loss, consciousness_constraints, emergent_n6_trainer, leech24_surface, n6_calculator, phi_efficiency_bridge, test_engine, thermodynamic_frame. Unblocks when T23~T29 restored.
entries.done_note: Stage1 staleness — shared root cause with hxa-004 (hexa_v2 transpiler predates codegen_c2.hexa SSOT). Full unblock needs hexa cc regen, blocked by __hexa_strlit_init dedup. Tracked as Phase 2 follow-up in commit 72cf21f4 body.

entries.title: name-mangling gap: now() / push() still leak (hxa-004 partial)

_meta.convention_loss_free_roi: All ROI-category proposals must use 무손실 (loss-free) semantics — no regression, no user-visible break. Category tag: `loss_free_roi`.

convention_cross_repo_blocker.rule: 다른 repo 의 작업을 blocking 하는 entry 는 priority ≥ 95 (0순위)

sub_categories.lang_gap: hexa-lang 언어/runtime 제약 → 모든 downstream repo blocker (rfind 미구현, reserved keyword 등)
sub_categories.resource_gap: 자원 (compute/network/disk/auth/host availability) 제약 → heavy compute offload blocker. airgenome 주 관심사 (Hetzner/runpod/3-host/Linux binary 등)
sub_categories.infra_gap: 인프라 설정 (plist/systemd/docker/rule) 제약 → deploy path blocker
sub_categories.atlas_gap: nexus / n6 atlas map / derivation chain 제약 → paper/product claim blocker
sub_categories.data_gap: anima cert / weight / checkpoint 제약 → training resume blocker
